title: API Security Guidelines — Part B (NZ Digital Government 2022)
description: Comprehensive reference architecture and technical implementation guidance for securing RESTful and modern APIs (GraphQL, AsyncAPI, gRPC). Covers authentication, authorization, identity management, threat protection, and Zero Trust principles for government API deployments.
